title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, examining the significance of the company going public before OpenAI, Claude's current capabilities, and whether Anthropic actually requires additional capital.
